items.title: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 as a cheaper way to run agents
items.raw_content: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.
items.summary: Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 5 brings stronger agentic capabilities, lower pricing, and improved safety, positioning the model as a cheaper alternative to Opus, GPT-5.5, and Gemini Pro.

items.title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
items.raw_content: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access tomorrow. Anthropic: We've received notice that the Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos […]

items.title: OpenClaw is finally available on Android and iOS
items.raw_content: The free open source agentic program is finally invading your phone.
items.summary: The free open source agentic program is finally invading your phone.

items.title: Anthropic’s Claude Science bets on workflow, not a new model, to win over scientists
items.raw_content: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.
items.summary: Anthropic's Claude Science is a workbench that gives scientists one environment to do computational research, saving them from the need to bounce between databases, pipelines, and tools.

items.title: Wayve launches $85M employee tender offer at $8.5B valuation
items.raw_content: Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.
items.summary: Wayve’s offering is part of a growing trend of AI startups using employee tenders as a strategic tool to attract and retain talent.

items.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
items.raw_content: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.
items.summary: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.

items.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
items.raw_content: Anthropic said it would begin restoring access to the Fable on July 1.
items.summary: Anthropic said it would begin restoring access to the Fable on July 1.

items.title: The DeepMind trio who built a poker AI are now making money for quant hedge funds
items.raw_content: EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.
items.summary: EquiLibre Technologies, a Prague-based AI lab founded by three ex-DeepMind researchers, is now valued at more than $500 million.

items.title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
items.raw_content: Acti is betting the smartphone keyboard is the next home for AI assistants. The startup's new keyboard for iOS and Android works across apps and lets users create custom AI-powered shortcuts using natural language.

items.title: Google introduces a faster, cheaper image generator with Nano Banana 2 Lite
items.raw_content: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.
items.summary: Google is updating its image generator to make it faster and cheaper, making it a more useful tool for creators looking to make AI content.

items.title: Google’s NotebookLM can sum up your research in a TikTok-style clip
items.raw_content: Google's NotebookLM is adding a new way to catch up on your notes: TikTok-style AI videos. The new feature is rolling out to Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers, allowing NotebookLM to generate 60-second vertical AI clips based on the sources you upload to the app. The example shared by Google details Australia's unsuccessful war […]

items.title: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
items.raw_content: A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer are real and not some Glasgow-style AI fakes, the voiceover is AI-generated. Deadline […]

items.title: The “Father of the Internet” is finally retiring
items.raw_content: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.
items.summary: Vinton Cerf, one of the creators of the protocols underlying the internet, will step down as Google's chief internet evangelist next week.

items.title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
items.raw_content: A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. In the coming weeks, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (D-PA) are planning to debut a new version of the Health and Location […]

items.title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
items.raw_content: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of […]

items.title: Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
items.raw_content: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. items.title: OpenAI is teasing new hardware… for Codex
items.raw_content: OpenAI is releasing some sort of device related to its AI-powered coding tool, Codex, on July 15th. items.title: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music, but isn’t banning it outright
items.raw_content: Tidal shared its new policies regarding AI-generated music today and how the platform plans to "protect artists" and "inform listeners." Instead of banning it outright, starting on July 15th Tidal will label tracks it has identified as being 100 percent AI-generated with an icon. But starting today those tracks will no longer be monetizable. "Tidal's […]
